view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for duplicate prevention in payment capture.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for duplicate prevention in payment capture.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Duplicate prevention in payment capture', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement was tested or satisfied. While the linked use case describes a scenario where duplicate bookings are prevented through idempotency keys, there is no direct evidence from the current saga run that demonstrates this functionality was tested or confirmed. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
